issues.comment: [next action offset calculation] sets offset to Math.min(current_offset + limit, user_count) but this can result in showing no results when offset equals user_count, should use Math.min(current_offset + limit, user_count - limit) to stay within valid range.
[setupController method] calls model.findMembers() without waiting for completion, but removes afterModel that previously waited, causing template to render before members data is loaded.
[template iteration] uses {{each member in members}} but the controller no longer sets a 'members' property, causing undefined iteration and empty member list display.
[findMembers method] returns undefined when name is empty but previously returned Ember.RSVP.resolve([]), breaking callers that expect a promise.
[destroy method return statement] has extra semicolon 'return };' which should be 'return;' for consistent syntax.
[setupController method] calls model.findMembers() without waiting for completion, but removes afterModel that previously waited, causing template to render before members data is loaded.
[template iteration] changed from 'model' to 'members' but the route setupController now passes model directly, causing undefined iteration and empty member list.
[remove_member method] calls group.users.delete(user_id) with an integer ID but ActiveRecord association delete() expects user objects, causing method failure and member not being removed.
[add_members method] uses params.require(:group_id) but route provides :id parameter, causing ActionController::ParameterMissing exception when accessing the endpoint.
[remove_member method] uses params.require(:group_id) but route provides :id parameter, causing ActionController::ParameterMissing exception when accessing the endpoint.
[add_members test] uses xhr :put, :add_members action but routes map to PUT /admin/groups/:id/members, causing test to fail with routing error since :add_members action doesn't exist as a route.

[remove_member test] uses xhr :delete, :remove_member action but routes map to DELETE /admin/groups/:id/members, causing test to fail with routing error since :remove_member action doesn't exist as a route.
